channel.title: Mac OS X on cafeTheatre
channel.description: Recent content in Mac OS X on cafeTheatre

item.title: Show hidden files and folders on Mac OS X (Mavericks, Yosemite and El Capitan)
item.description: Created on Dec 09, 2015 by pabloked copydefaults write com.apple.finder AppleShowAllFiles YES copykillall Finder DESCRIPTION By default, macOS hides critical system files and folders.
